summary: Tested balance calculation fix in Daily Projection dialog. The fix correctly syncs runningBalance with effectiveBalance for stored trade data and includes commissions in all balance calculations. Balance progression is now correct day-by-day.

balance_calculation_fix.description: Balance Before values flow correctly day-by-day in Daily Projection dialog
balance_calculation_fix.evidence: Verified January 2026 data: Jan 16 ($18,649.40) + profit ($293.66) = Jan 20 ($18,943.06) - EXACT MATCH. Future days also calculate correctly: Jan 20 + target ($289.80) = Jan 21 ($19,232.86) - EXACT MATCH
fix_verified: Line 327-328: runningBalance synced with effectiveBalance for today
Line 334-337: Balance derived from stored lot_size (Balance = LOT × 980) and runningBalance synced
Line 369-370: Commission included in balance calculation (runningBalance += actualProfit + commission)

past_month_calculation.description: Past month (December 2025) balance calculations work correctly
past_month_calculation.evidence: December 2025 shows correct balance flow with deposits/withdrawals properly accounted for. Large balance changes (e.g., Dec 4 to Dec 5 drop of ~$1,899) are explained by transactions.

commission_inclusion.description: Commissions are included in balance calculations
commission_inclusion.evidence: Line 1235 in dailyProjectionData useMemo includes commission: totalProfitAfterMonth += (log?.actual_profit || 0) + (log?.commission || 0)

user_reported_issue.description: User reported Jan 30 showed $16,777.60 instead of expected $32,065.53
user_reported_issue.evidence: Current data shows Jan 30 Balance Before as $21,398.59 which is correctly calculated from Jan 29 ($21,076.09) + target profit ($322.50). The discrepancy may be due to different data state when user reported the issue.
user_reported_issue.note: Database only has trades up to Jan 19, 2026 - no trades exist for Jan 28-30 that user screenshot showed

january_2026.jan_2_to_jan_5: Balance $12,975.20 + profit $203.68 = $13,178.88 (actual: $13,181.00, diff ~$2 due to stored lot_size derivation)

december_2025.dec_1_to_dec_2: Balance $12,867.40 + profit $208.77 = $13,076.17 (actual: $13,083.00, diff ~$7 due to stored lot_size derivation)

critical_code_review_comments: Fix correctly implemented: runningBalance is synced with effectiveBalance at lines 328 and 337
Balance derivation from stored lot_size (line 334) ensures consistency with Trade History
Commission inclusion in balance calculation (line 370) is correct
Small balance differences (~$2-7) are expected due to truncation and stored lot_size derivation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Balance calculation fix verified. The fix syncs runningBalance with effectiveBalance for stored trade data and includes commissions. Small differences (~$2-7) between expected and actual balances are due to the fix deriving balance from stored lot_size (Balance = LOT × 980) to ensure consistency with Trade History. User's reported issue ($16,777.60 vs $32,065.53) cannot be reproduced with current data.
